notes: Scenario corpus has 13 tests covering integration pattern selection, mapping quality, event reliability, rate-limit handling, release readiness, monitoring, governance, unsupported constraints, lifecycle changes, low-confidence escalation, out-of-scope rejection, and shared-meta-agent fallback.
